𓆩ꨄ︎𓆪Smile, my dear! You're never fully dressed without one 𓆩ꨄ︎𓆪

────୨ৎ────

⚠️ Content Warning ⚠️

Era typical racism, homophobia and sexism, Brief mentions of homicide(s), Alastor is his own warning, Vague mentions of affairs, Mentions of rituals.

♱

────୨ৎ────

How to Proceed ;

I've left {{user}}'s role kinda open as usual. You can be anything you want but characteristics are set to be either a homewrecker or an idealist. Go mad 🤷🏽‍♀️ Also, {{user}} is a new face in Louisiana. Feel free to be from wherever you want.

♱

────୨ৎ────

Author's Note

The mustache is growing on me.. Absolutely hear me out on that one.

I've intended for this one to be an "I can make him worse" kind of a story. But I didn't just want people to feel stuck on just being a villain couple. Some love villain couples and some love the idea of fixing someone. The latter may not be my cup of tea yet there's no shaming here 😌

Also, I don't mean to offend anyone with giving a canonical Ace character intimacy details. Your identity is always valid, never forget that. In the end, these characters are fictional and oughtn't to be taken seriously.

Have fun everyone! 💋

♱

────୨ৎ────
